completed_tasks.name: Wipe jira.db and redesign schema with users/sessions/user_id FKs on all tables
Create models/session.py — create_session, get_session_user, delete_session (7-day TTL)
Create dependencies.py — get_current_user FastAPI dep (reads session cookie)
Update models/oauth_token.py — all functions take user_id param
Rewrite routers/auth.py — OAuth callback fetches Atlassian /me, upserts user, creates session cookie; /me reads session; /logout deletes session
Update routers/sync.py — Depends(get_current_user) + user_id filter on all DB queries
Update routers/export.py — Depends(get_current_user) + user_id filter on all 4 endpoints
Update routers/jira.py — Depends(get_current_user) guard on all 3 endpoints
Thread user_id through all functions in jira_sync_service.py and jira_sprint_service.py
Update jira_service.py — count_projects(user_id) call in test_and_save
Update main.py — allow_credentials=True, add DELETE to allow_methods
Add credentials: 'include' to all 22 fetch() calls in 4 frontend pages
Update .env.example with ATLASSIAN_CLIENT_ID, ATLASSIAN_CLIENT_SECRET, FRONTEND_URL, COOKIE_SECURE

remaining_tasks.name: Restart backend server (kill old uvicorn, start fresh)
UAT: Login as User A, add project, sync bugs — verify dashboard shows data
UAT: Login as User B in incognito/separate browser — verify empty state (data isolation confirmed)
UAT: Logout — verify session cookie cleared, redirected to login page
UAT: Export endpoints — verify DOCX/XLSX download still works with session cookie

blockers.description: Docker CLI unavailable in WSL — cannot restart containers directly
blockers.workaround: Run uvicorn directly in WSL: cd backend && source ../.venv/bin/activate && uvicorn backend.main:app --port 8000. For frontend: cd frontend && npm run dev.

blockers.description: uvicorn --reload blind to WSL file changes (NTFS limitation)
blockers.workaround: Kill and restart uvicorn manually after backend changes

blockers.description: UAT requires 2 separate Atlassian accounts to verify data isolation
blockers.workaround: Use incognito window + second Atlassian account, or use two different browsers

human_actions_pending.action: Restart backend server to load new schema and code changes
human_actions_pending.context: 17 backend files changed. New DB schema with users/sessions tables. Old process has stale code.

human_actions_pending.action: Do UAT with 2 Atlassian accounts to verify data isolation
human_actions_pending.context: Core requirement — must confirm User A data not visible to User B

decisions.rationale: User chose this. Cookie auto-sent by browser, XSS-proof (JS cannot read), CSRF protection via SameSite=Lax.
User chose this. Old schema has no user_id; new schema requires user_id NOT NULL on all data tables. Clean start.
Stateful sessions — instant revocation possible. sessions.expires_at checked against datetime('now') on each request.

decisions.decision: COOKIE_SECURE env-driven (default false for dev, true for prod)
decisions.rationale: localhost is HTTP so Secure attribute would block cookie entirely. Set COOKIE_SECURE=true in production.

decisions.decision: OAuth token NOT deleted on logout — only session deleted
decisions.rationale: Re-login creates new session without full OAuth dance. Token stays encrypted in DB keyed to user_id.

decisions.decision: jira_config table kept without user_id — API token auth (jira.py) is dead code in UI
decisions.rationale: ConnectionPage uses OAuth only. jira.py endpoints protected by Depends(get_current_user) but jira_config remains global. Can be removed later.

next_action: Commit all changes, then restart backend (kill uvicorn, start fresh at port 8000), restart frontend (npm run dev), then UAT: login as User A → add project → verify data; login as User B in incognito → verify empty state.
context_notes: Full multi-user implementation completed in one session. All 22 fetch() calls updated with credentials: include. All backend functions thread user_id. New DB schema initialized (jira.db recreated with new tables). All Python files pass AST syntax check. Implementation UNTESTED — no UAT done yet. Previous session work (responsive CSS, navbar logo) is already committed.
